articles.title: NASA's Artemis 2 moonshot was just the 'opening act' for America's return to the moon, space agency chief says
articles.description: Artemis 2 kicks off a lunar "relay race" that will lead the NASA and its international partners to a moon base and, eventually, Mars, NASA chief Jared Isaacman says.

articles.title: Q&A: Astronaut Linda Godwin on lessons learned from Artemis
articles.description: Linda Godwin, a former NASA astronaut and a veteran of four space shuttle missions, knows what it’s like to spend a significant time in space. articles.title: ‘The show goes on:’ NASA looks beyond Artemis 2
articles.description: NASA’s Artemis 2 mission returned safely to Earth the evening of April 10, completing a critical early step in the agency’s effort to send astronauts back to the moon. articles.title: Axiom Space plans 2027 flight test of spacesuit

articles.title: All eyes on Orion’s heat shield: Artemis 2 astronauts will hit Earth's atmosphere at nearly 24,000 mph on April 10
